_comment: Pendle Router V4 real txs (Etherscan txlist, mainnet, adapter-blind, 2026-05-31). Covered = 13 yield selectors decode→yield ActionBody. Deferred (expect:error) = multicall/swapTokensToTokens/callAndReflect/exit* (documented EXCLUDE in surface coverage).
